mapper.update: UPDATE evaluations_51 SET comments = #{comments}, reason = #{reason}, score = #{score}, confirm_status_code = #{confirmStatusCode}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, version = version + 1 WHERE eval_id = #{evalId} AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM evaluations_51 WHERE mapping_id = #{mappingId} AND is_deleted = 'n'
